task_completion.description: Open the college_scorecard.csv file in WPS Spreadsheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: WPS Spreadsheet application is open and displaying the contents of the college_scorecard.csv dataset.

task_completion.description: Filter the dataset based on STABBR, PREDDEG, GRAD_DEBT_MDN, and MD_EARN_WNE_P10 criteria
task_completion.visual_evidence: Filter icons are visible on the column headers. Filter dialogs or active filters show STABBR set to 'PA', PREDDEG set to 3, and 'PrivacySuppressed'/'NULL' unchecked for the debt and earnings columns.

task_completion.description: Transfer the filtered data to a new sheet named 'PA_Analysis'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sheet tab named 'PA_Analysis' is visible at the bottom of the WPS window, containing the filtered data (should be exactly 24 rows of data plus the header row, ending at row 25).

task_completion.description: Create a new 'Debt_to_Earnings' column calculated as GRAD_DEBT_MDN divided by MD_EARN_WNE_P10
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new column header 'Debt_to_Earnings' is visible. The cells below it contain decimal values, and the formula bar may show a division formula (e.g., =E2/F2) when a cell in this column is selected.

task_completion.description: Sort the data by MD_EARN_WNE_P10 in descending order
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values in the MD_EARN_WNE_P10 column are ordered from highest to lowest from top to bottom.

task_completion.description: Highlight the top 5 school names in the INSTNM column with a yellow background
task_completion.visual_evidence: Exactly 5 cells in the INSTNM (Institution Name) column, specifically the top 5 data rows (e.g., rows 2 through 6), have a yellow background fill color.
The WPS Spreadsheet window title shows 'PA_College_ROI.xlsx' or a 'Save As' dialog is visible saving the file to /home/ga/Documents/ with this name.

integrity.description: The agent used the WPS Spreadsheet GUI to perform the tasks rather than a terminal script
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the WPS Spreadsheet interface (menus, ribbons, dialog boxes) rather than a terminal window running Python or bash scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used spreadsheet formulas or built-in tools for calculations and sorting
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar shows actual formulas for the Debt_to_Earnings column, and the sort dialog/buttons were used, rather than manually typing in pre-calculated answers.

integrity.description: The agent used the spreadsheet's fill color tool to highlight the cells
integrity.visual_evidence: The ribbon's 'Fill Color' (paint bucket) tool is seen being used or selected to apply the yellow background to the cells.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is '/home/ga/Documents/PA_College_ROI.xlsx'. The filtered data must be placed in a sheet named 'PA_Analysis'. There should be exactly 24 valid rows of data (plus the header row, totaling 25 rows) after applying the filters for PA state, PREDDEG=3, and excluding NULL/PrivacySuppressed values.
